data.biography:
Gad Elmaleh (born April 19, 1971) is a French-Moroccan stand-up comedian and actor. He has starred in several feature films, including Coco, Hors de prix, and La Doublure.

He is known for his stand-up comedy specials Décalages (1997), La Vie normale (2000), L'autre c'est moi (2005), Papa est en haut (2007), Sans tambour (2013), 20 ans de scène (2015), Oh My Gad (2015), Gad Elmaleh part en live (2016), American Dream (2017), D’Ailleurs (2022).
data.name: Gad Elmaleh

data.biography:
Gad Elmaleh, né le 19 avril 1971 à Casablanca au Maroc, est un humoriste, acteur, réalisateur et chanteur maroco-canadien.

Surtout connu en France pour ses spectacles de stand-up, il s'essaie avec succès au cinéma en portant les deux comédies Chouchou (2003) et Coco (2009), adaptées de personnages qu'il a créés sur scène.

Parallèlement, il tient également les premiers rôles de comédies romantiques : A+ Pollux (2001), Hors de prix (2006) et Un bonheur n'arrive jamais seul (2012) et donne la réplique à des valeurs sûres de la comédie française : Gérard Depardieu dans Olé ! (2004) de Florence Quentin ou encore Dany Boon pour La Doublure (2005), de Francis Veber.

Durant les années 2010, il entame une carrière d'humoriste aux États-Unis, après avoir participé à trois productions au succès international : Les Aventures de Tintin : Le Secret de La Licorne, de Steven Spielberg, Minuit à Paris (2011), de Woody Allen, et L'Écume des jours (2013), de Michel Gondry.

data.biography:
叶山豪，原名小室博义，1975年4月10日出生于日本京都府，日本男演员。

2001年，出演个人首部电影《不解之谜》，从而正式进入演艺圈。2006年，出演喜剧电影《宝贝计划》 [1]  。2010年，主演成人电影《3D肉蒲团之极乐宝鉴》，在剧中饰演男主角未央生 [2-3]  。2012年，在电影《石器时代之百万大侦探》中担纲男一号 [4-5]  。2014年，在公益微电影《乡味》中担纲男一号 [6]  。2015年3月，凭借《3D肉蒲团之极乐宝鉴》入围第一届ETtoday新闻云金虾奖“最虾男演员奖”提名 [7]  。同年12月，加入速度系列作品《尾牌Q1》剧组，担任男一。2016年7月21日，网络大电影《殓师》全网上线，在剧中饰演男主HERO [8]  。同年9月22日，主演的爱情电影《初恋时光》上映
data.name: 叶山豪

data.biography:
葉山豪，本名小室博義，日本京都府出生，日本電影演員。早年在日本京都擔任餐廳侍應，因對演藝事業有濃厚興趣，1999 年到台灣任模特兒，2001 年透過一名香港女模特兒介紹下，到香港參與拍攝其首部電影《不解之謎》而出道。他曾參與演戲多部由成龍主演的電影，如《新警察故事》、《新宿事件》等，於電影中主要演日本人角。2010 年演出電影《分手説愛你》，同年亦接拍由蕭若元監製的香港首部三維情色電影《3D 肉蒲團之極樂寶鑑》，飾演男主角未央生，2011 年 4 月 14 日於香港上映且為觀眾所注意。

2018 年，首度參與拍攝日本電視劇《基度山恩仇記 - 華麗的復仇-》，在劇中飾演一名香港黑幫份子，與主演藤岡靛有對手戲。

葉山豪的藝名，源於其朋友喜歡山葉機車，以山葉倒轉為「葉山」作姓，並由相士起名「豪」為藝名。
data.name: 葉山豪

data.biography:
Musa Uzunlar, 22 Nisan 1959 tarihinde Antalya'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Aslen Niğdeli/Kemerhisarlı bir ailenin çocuğu olan Uzunlar, tiyatro eğitimini Mimar Sinan Üniversitesi Devlet Konservatuvarı Tiyatro Bölümü'nde tamamlayarak 1985 yılında mezun olmuştur. Profesyonel sanat hayatına devlet tiyatrolarında başlayan usta oyuncu; Bursa, Ankara ve İstanbul Devlet Tiyatroları'nda hem oyuncu hem de yönetmen olarak çok sayıda oyunda görev almış, disiplini ve sahne hakimiyetiyle tiyatro dünyasında saygın bir yer edinmiştir. Tiyatro yazarlığı da yapan Uzunlar, "Hüzün Mahallesi Otobüsü" ve "Kaplumbağanın Ninnisi" gibi oyunları kaleme almıştır.

Televizyon dünyasında "Süper Baba", "Ateş Dansı" ve "Merdoğlu" gibi dizilerle yer almaya başlasa da, Musa Uzunlar'ı Türkiye çapında bir fenomen haline getiren ve kariyerinin en ikonik zirvesi olan rol, "Kurtlar Vadisi Pusu" dizisindeki "İskender Büyük" karakteridir. Derin devletin güçlü ve acımasız ismi olarak canlandırdığı bu karakter, kendine has ağır konuşma tarzı, mimikleri ve karizmasıyla o kadar büyük bir etki yaratmıştır ki, ana karakterlere rakip bir popülariteye ulaşmıştır. Bu ilgi üzerine karakterin geçmişini anlatan "Kurtlar Vadisi Gladio" (2009) adlı sinema filmi çekilmiş ve Uzunlar bu filmde başrolü üstlenmiştir.

İskender Büyük efsanesinin ardından "Fatmagül'ün Suçu Ne?" (2010-2012) dizisindeki Reşat Yaşaran rolüyle bambaşka bir kötü adam portresi çizerek oyunculuk yelpazesinin genişliğini kanıtlamıştır. Ancak Musa Uzunlar'ın televizyon tarihindeki ikinci büyük efsanesi, 2015-2017 yılları arasında yayınlanan "Poyraz Karayel" dizisindeki "Bahri Umman" karakteri olmuştur. Geleneksel bir mafya babasından öte, "Bahri Baba" lakabıyla anılan, sert kurallarının altında babacan bir yürek taşıyan, adaletli ve bilge bir karakteri canlandırdığı bu rol, özellikle genç kuşak tarafından büyük bir sevgiyle karşılanmıştır.

Sinemada "Hayal Kurma Oyunları" ve "Cingöz Recai" gibi yapımlarda da yer alan sanatçı, dijital platformlarda Netflix yapımı "Biz Kimden Kaçıyorduk Anne?" dizisinde rol almıştır. Son dönemde ise "Hayatımın Şansı" ve popüler dizi "Aile" (2023) gibi yapımlarda ustalığını konuşturmaya devam etmiştir. Karakterlere getirdiği derinlik, etkileyici ses tonu ve karizmatik duruşuyla Musa Uzunlar, Türk tiyatro, sinema ve televizyonunun en önemli karakter oyuncularından biri olarak kabul edilmektedir.
data.name: Musa Uzunlar

data.biography:
He is originally from Kemerhisar, Nigde. He graduated from Mimar Sinan University State Conservatory Theatre Department in 1985 and started working in State Theatres.

He worked as an actor and director in Bursa, Ankara and Istanbul State Theatres. In addition to his managerial duties at the State Theatres, he also worked as a manager at the State Theatres Sports Club and the State Opera and Ballet Employees Foundation TOBAV. He directed plays at the State Theatres in Bursa, Adana, Diyarbakir, Trabzon, Ankara and Istanbul. He also directed plays in state theaters in Bursa, Adana, Diyarbakir, Trabzon, Ankara and Istanbul. He also worked as a director in Izmit City Theatre, Bakirkoy Municipality Theatres, Eskisehir Theatre Anadolu, Yeditepe Players, Abdullah Sahin/Nokta Theatre, Theatre Ti, Ankara Finance Theatre, Theatre Adam and Macedonia Skopje Peoples Theatre and Bulgaria Ruscuk State Theatre. He also worked as an actor in many plays in private and paid theaters. He wrote two plays, Hüzün Mahallesi Otobüsü and Turtle's Lullaby. The first of these was published and staged at the State Theatres. He worked as an instructor at Uludag University Faculty of Education, Eskisehir Anadolu University State Conservatory Theatre Department, Mimar Sinan University Performing and Visual Arts Department and State Conservatory Theatre Department. He is currently working as an instructor at Halic University and Yeditepe University. He also works in cinema, television and dubbing. He is the President of TOBAV Istanbul Branch. He has starred in many series and films. He became widely known with the character of Iskender Büyük in Kurtlar Vadisi Pusu and the film Kurtlar Vadisi Gladio. He also starred in the series "Subat", which was broadcast on TRT 1 between 2012-2013. Later, he played the character of Bahri Umman in the series Poyraz Karayel, which was broadcast on Kanal D between 2015-2017.

data.biography:
Lena Klenke ist eine deutsche Schauspielerin, geboren am 15. Oktober 1995 in Berlin als Anna Lena Klenke. Sie gab ihr Filmdebüt im Alter von 13 Jahren 2010 in Baran bo Odars preisgekröntem Drama „Das letzte Schweigen“, in dem sie eine spurlos verschwundene Teenagerin verkörperte. Bekannt wurde sie durch die Rolle der Laura Schnabelstedt in der erfolgreichen Kinofilmreihe „Fack ju Göhte“ (1–3, 2013–2017), ergänzt um Auftritte in Filmen wie „Victoria“ (2015), „Becks letzter Sommer“ (2015), „Rock My Heart“ (2017) und „Das schweigende Klassenzimmer“ (2018).​

Aktuelle Rollen umfassen Serien wie „How to Sell Drugs Online (Fast)“ (Netflix, 2019–2024, als Lisa), „Die Zweiflers“ (ARD, 2023–2024, als Alex), „Die Hochzeit“ (ARD, 2024, als Simone Streuble) sowie TV-Filme wie „Perfect Match“ (Prime Video, 2023). Ausgezeichnet wurde sie u. a. mit dem Bayerischen Filmpreis als Beste Nachwuchsdarstellerin 2016 für „Fack ju Göhte 2“ und dem Hessischen Film- und Kinopreis 2024 für „Die Zweiflers“. Mit 165 cm athletischer Statur, blonden Haaren und blauen Augen spricht sie fließend Englisch und beherrscht Dialekte wie Berlinerisch sowie Sportarten wie Boxen und Reiten; sie lebt in Berlin und München.

Lena Klenke is a German actress, born on October 15, 1995, in Berlin as Anna Lena Klenke. She made her film debut at the age of 13 in 2010 in Baran bo Odar’s award-winning drama The Silence, in which she portrayed a teenage girl who disappeared without a trace. She became known for her role as Laura Schnabelstedt in the successful film series Suck Me Shakespeer (parts 1–3, 2013–2017), complemented by appearances in films such as Victoria (2015), Beck’s Last Summer (2015), Rock My Heart (2017), and The Silent Revolution (2018). Her recent roles include series such as How to Sell Drugs Online (Fast) (Netflix, 2019–2024, as Lisa), The Doubters (ARD, 2023–2024, as Alex), The Wedding (ARD, 2024, as Simone Streuble), as well as TV films like Perfect Match (Prime Video, 2023). She has received several awards, including the Bavarian Film Award for Best Young Actress in 2016 for Suck Me Shakespeer 2 and the Hessian Film and Cinema Award in 2024 for The Doubters. Standing 165 cm tall with an athletic build, blonde hair, and blue eyes, she speaks fluent English, masters dialects such as Berlin dialect, and practices sports like boxing and horseback riding; she lives in Berlin and Munich.
data.name: Lena Klenke

Aktuelle Rollen umfassen Serien wie „How to Sell Drugs Online (Fast)“ (Netflix, 2019–2024, als Lisa), „Die Zweiflers“ (ARD, 2023–2024, als Alex), „Die Hochzeit“ (ARD, 2024, als Simone Streuble) sowie TV-Filme wie „Perfect Match“ (Prime Video, 2023). Ausgezeichnet wurde sie u. a. mit dem Bayerischen Filmpreis als Beste Nachwuchsdarstellerin 2016 für „Fack ju Göhte 2“ und dem Hessischen Film- und Kinopreis 2024 für „Die Zweiflers“. Mit 165 cm athletischer Statur, blonden Haaren und blauen Augen spricht sie fließend Englisch und beherrscht Dialekte wie Berlinerisch sowie Sportarten wie Boxen und Reiten; sie lebt in Berlin und München.

Connor Trinneer (born March 19, 1969) is an American film, stage and television actor. His highest profile roles have been those of Charles "Trip" Tucker III on Star Trek: Enterprise and Michael on Stargate Atlantis.

Trinneer was born on March 19, 1969 in Walla Walla, Washington, but spent many years in Kelso, where he attended elementary, middle and then Kelso High School. He attended Pacific Lutheran University in Tacoma. While at PLU, he played college football. He graduated with a Bachelor of Fine Arts degree in acting, then went on to obtain a Master of Fine Arts degree from University of Missouri–Kansas City.

Trinneer married Ariana Navarre on May 29, 2004; they have a son, Jasper (born October 11, 2005).
data.name: Connor Trinneer

data.biography:
Connor Trinneer (* 19. März 1969 in Walla Walla, Washington) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler.

In Fernsehserien wie Liebe, Lüge, Leidenschaft, Sliders – Das Tor in eine fremde Dimension oder Ein Hauch von Himmel trat er erstmals in Nebenrollen auf. In Far East spielte er die Rolle des homosexuellen Offiziers Bob Munger.

Von 2001 bis 2005 spielte Trinneer die Rolle des Chefingenieurs Commander Charles „Trip“ Tucker III in der Science-Fiction-Fernsehserie Star Trek: Enterprise. Mit dieser Rolle wurde er einem breiten Publikum bekannt. Weiterhin hatte er von 2006 bis 2008 eine wiederkehrende Nebenrolle in Stargate Atlantis in der Rolle des Wraith Michael.

Hauptsächlich ist er in verschiedenen Fernsehserien zu sehen, in denen er Gastrollen übernimmt.

Quelle: Wikipedia

Connor Trinneer, urodzony w 1969 roku w Walla Walla, jest amerykańskim aktorem telewizyjnym.

Jest absolwentem Pacific Lutheran University w Waszyngtonie gdzie porzucił football amerykański dla aktorstwa. Swoją naukę kontynuował na Uniwersytecie Missouri w Kansas City gdzie zdobył tytuł magistra sztuk pięknych.

Jego pierwszym mocnym akcentem był występ w sztuce "Arcadia" w bostońskiej grupie teatralnej, the Huntington Theater Company. W międzyczasie gościnnie występował w serialach telewizyjnych jak np. "Touched by an Angel" (Dotyk anioła) czy "ER" (Ostry dyżur).

Przełom nastąpił wraz z rolą Charles'a "Trip'a" Tucker'a III w serialu "Enterprise" (Star Trek: Enterprise). Na swoim koncie ma również epizodyczne role w takich hitach telewizyjnych jak: "Stargate: Atlantis" (Gwiezdne Wrota: Atlantyda), "Numb3rs" (Wzór) i "Terminator: The Sarah Connor Chronicles"(Terminator: Kroniki Sary Connor).

Helen Elizabeth Hunt (born June 15, 1963) is an American actress and director. She is the recipient of numerous accolades, including an Academy Award, four Primetime Emmy Awards, and four Golden Globe Awards.

Hunt rose to fame in 1992, portraying Jamie Buchman in the sitcom Mad About You which earned her three Golden Globe Awards for Best Actress and four Primetime Emmy Awards for Lead Actress.

In 1997, Hunt won the Academy Award for Best Actress for starring as Carol Connelly in the romantic comedy As Good as It Gets, while her portrayal of Cheryl Cohen-Greene in The Sessions (2012), gained her a nomination for the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress. Her other notable films include Twister (1996), Cast Away (2000), What Women Want (2000), Pay It Forward (2000), Bobby (2006), Soul Surfer (2011), and The Miracle Season (2018).

Hunt made her directorial film debut with Then She Found Me (2007), and has directed the film Ride (2014), and episodes of television series, including House of Lies, This Is Us, Feud: Bette and Joan, American Housewife, and the premiere episode of the Mad About You revival.

data.biography:
Helen Elizabeth Hunt ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin und Regisseurin.

Hunt wurde durch ihre Rolle als frisch verheiratete Jamie Buchman in der Sitcom Verrückt nach dir (1992–1999) bekannt, für die sie drei Golden Globe Awards als Beste Hauptdarstellerin und vier Primetime Emmy Awards als Beste Hauptdarstellerin erhielt. Für ihre Rolle als alleinerziehende Mutter in der romantischen Komödie Besser geht’s nicht (1997) gewann Hunt den Oscar als Beste Hauptdarstellerin. Ihre Filmkarriere startete sie mit Hauptrollen in Twister (1996), Cast Away (2000), Was Frauen wollen (2000) und Pay It Forward (2000).

Hunt gab ihr Regiedebüt mit Then She Found Me (2007). Für ihre Darstellung der Cheryl Cohen-Greene in The Sessions (2012) wurde sie für den Oscar als Beste Nebendarstellerin nominiert. Zu ihren weiteren bemerkenswerten Filmen zählen Bobby (2006), Soul Surfer (2011) und The Miracle Season (2018). Außerdem führte sie Regie bei dem Film Ride (2014) und bei Episoden von Fernsehserien, darunter House of Lies (2016), This Is Us (2016), Feud: Bette and Joan (2017), American Housewife (2018) und der ersten Episode der Neuauflage von Verrückt nach dir (2019).
data.name: Helen Hunt

data.biography:
Helen Hunt színész családban született 1963. június 15-én, Los Angelesben. Apja színházi rendező volt, Helen pedig már hat évesen eldöntötte, hogy színésznő lesz. Nem sokkal később A padlásszoba hercegnője című sorozatban debütált, de még kamaszkora előtt több színdarabban is játszott.

Első jelentős filmszerepét a Előre a múltba (196) című filmben kapta, melyben Nicolas Cage és Kathleen Turner lányát játszotta, de több kisebb szerep után emlékezetes alakítást nyújtott a Tánc a vízenben (1992) is. Kollégája, Eric Stoltz, elismerően nyilatkozott róla, mondván, Helen az egyik legkeményebben dolgozó nő, akit valaha is ismert. Tehetségére már a kritikusok is felfigyeltek, ekkoriban azonban még mindig csak mellékszerepekben láthatta őt a közönség (Bob Roberts – 1992, Megérint a halál – 1995) . 1992-ben főszerepet kapott a Megőrülök érted című televíziós sorozatban, mellyel hatalmas népszerűségre tett szert. Alakításáért a legjobb színésznőnek járó Golden Globe-díjjal jutalmazták.

Karrierjében az áttörést az 1996-os Twister hozta meg, melyért a legjobb színésznő kategóriában Blockbuster-díjat nyert. Ekkor figyelt fel rá James L. Brooks filmrendező, és főszerepet ajánlott neki Jack Nicholson oldalán a Lesz ez még így se! (1997) című filmben. Kiemelkedő teljesítményét Oscar-díjjal jutalmazta a szakma.

Tévés szerepléseit is siker koronázta. A Megőrülök értedben nyújtott alakításáért négy alkalommal nyerte el a Golden Globe-díjat.

A színésznő az ezredforduló után többek között olyan filmekben kapott szerepet, mint a Mi kell a nőnek? (2000), az A múlt fogságában (2005) és a Bobby Kennedy - A végzetes nap (2006). Legutóbb a kritikusok valamint a nézők körében is igen népszerű A kezelés című filmben nyújtott emlékezetes alakítást.

Helen Hunt 1999. júliusában házasságot kötött Hank Azaria színésszel, de a kapcsolatuk 2000-ben válással végződött.

Helen Elizabeth Hunt (Culver City, 15 de Junho de 1963) é uma cineasta e atriz norte-americana. Ela recebeu vários prêmios ao longo de sua carreira, incluindo um Oscar e quatro prêmios Emmy. Hunt ganhou fama interpretando Jamie Buchman na sitcom Mad About You (1992–1999, 2019), que lhe rendeu três prêmios Globo de Ouro de melhor atriz em série de comédia ou musical[3] e quatro Emmy de melhor atriz numa série de comédia. Ela ganhou o Oscar de melhor atriz pelo filme Melhor É Impossível (1997), enquanto sua interpretação de Cheryl Cohen-Greene em As Sessões (2012).

Η Έλεν Ελίζαμπεθ Χαντ (γεννημένη στις 15 Ιουνίου 1963)) είναι Αμερικανίδα ηθοποιός, σκηνοθέτης και σεναριογράφος. Πρωταγωνίστησε στην κωμική σειρά Mad About You για επτά χρόνια, πριν συμμετάσχει στη ρομαντική κωμωδία Καλύτερα δε Γίνεται (As Good as It Gets, 1997), για την οποία κέρδισε το Όσκαρ Α' Γυναικείου Ρόλου. Άλλες ταινίες περιλαμβάνουν: Twister (1996), Ο Ναυαγός (Cast Away, 2000), Αυτό Που Θέλουν οι Γυναίκες (What Women Want, 2000), Χωρίς Αντάλλαγμα (Pay It Forward), Η Νικήτρια (Soul Surfer, 2011) και Μαθήματα Ενηλικίωσης (The Sessions, 2012). Έκανε το σκηνοθετικό της ντεμπούτο το 2007, με την ταινία Όταν με Βρήκε (Then She Found Me).
data.name: Έλεν Χαντ

data.biography:
Helen Elizabeth Hunt (nacida el 15 de junio de 1963) es una actriz y directora estadounidense. Ha recibido numerosos elogios, incluido un Premio de la Academia, cuatro Premios Primetime Emmy y cuatro Premios Globo de Oro.

Hunt saltó a la fama en 1992, interpretando a Jamie Buchman en la comedia Mad About You, que le valió tres premios Globo de Oro a la mejor actriz y cuatro premios Primetime Emmy a la actriz principal.

En 1997, Hunt ganó el Premio de la Academia a la Mejor Actriz por interpretar a Carol Connelly en la comedia romántica As Good as It Gets, mientras que su interpretación de Cheryl Cohen-Greene en The Sessions (2012) le valió una nominación al Premio de la Academia por Mejor actriz de soporte. Sus otras películas notables incluyen Twister (1996), Cast Away (2000), What Women Want (2000), Pay It Forward (2000), Bobby (2006), Soul Surfer (2011) y The Miracle Season (2018).

Hunt hizo su debut como directora con Then She Found Me (2007) y ha dirigido la película Ride (2014) y episodios de series de televisión, incluidas House of Lies, This Is Us, Feud: Bette and Joan, American Housewife y el episodio de estreno del resurgimiento de Mad About You.

海伦·伊丽莎白·亨特（Helen Elizabeth Hunt，1963年6月15日-），美国女演员、导演。她获得了无数荣誉，包括奥斯卡金像奖、四项黄金时段艾美奖和四项金球奖。

亨特于 1992 年声名鹊起，在情景喜剧《为你疯狂》中饰演杰米·布赫曼，为她赢得了三项金球奖最佳女主角奖和四项黄金时段艾美奖女主角奖。

1997 年，亨特因在浪漫喜剧《尽善尽美》中饰演卡罗尔·康纳利而获得奥斯卡最佳女主角奖，而她在《会议》（2012 年）中饰演谢丽尔·科恩-格林，为她赢得了奥斯卡最佳女配角奖的提名。她的其他著名电影包括 Twister （1996）、Cast Away （2000）、What Women Want （2000）、Pay It Forward （2000）、Bobby （2006）、Soul Surfer （2011） 和 The Miracle Season （2018）。

亨特的导演处女作是《然后她找到了我》（2007 年），并执导了电影《骑行》（2014 年）和电视连续剧的剧集，包括《谎言之家》、《这就是我们》、《世仇：贝蒂和琼》、《美国家庭主妇》和《为你疯狂》复兴的首播集。
data.name: 海伦·亨特

data.biography:
海倫·伊利沙伯·亨特（Helen Elizabeth Hunt，1963 年 6 月 15 日-），美國女演員、導演。她獲得了無數榮譽，包括奧斯卡金像獎、四項黃金時段艾美獎和四項金球獎。

亨特於 1992 年聲名鵲起，在情景喜劇《新婚物語》（Mad About You）（1992 – 99）中飾演 Jamie Buchman ，為她贏得了三項金球獎最佳女主角獎和四項黃金時段艾美獎女主角獎。

1997 年，亨特因在浪漫喜劇《貓屎先生》（As Good as It Gets）（1997）中飾演 Carol Connelly 而獲得奧斯卡最佳女主角獎，而她在《聖手回春》（The Sessions）（2012 年）中飾演 Cheryl Cohen - Greene ，為她贏得了奧斯卡最佳女配角獎的提名。她的其他著名電影包括《龍捲風暴》（Twister） （1996）、《劫後重生》（Cast Away） （2000）、《偷聽女人心》（What Women Want）（2000）、《拉闊愛的人》（Pay It Forward）（2000）、《RFK 遇刺的那天》（Bobby）（2006）和《擊浪奇蹟》（Soul Surfer）（2011）。

亨特的導演處女作是《Then She Found Me》（2007 年），並執導了電影《Ride》（2014 年）和電視連續劇的劇集，包括《House of Lies》、《This Is Us》、《Feud: Bette and Joan》、《American Housewife》和《新婚物語》（Mad About You）復興的首播集。
data.name: 海倫·亨特

data.biography:
Helen Elizabeth Hunt (nata il 15 giugno 1963) è un'attrice e regista americana. Ha ricevuto numerosi riconoscimenti, tra cui un Premio Oscar, quattro Primetime Emmy Awards e quattro Golden Globe.

Hunt è diventata famosa nel 1992, interpretando Jamie Buchman nella sitcom Mad About You, che le ha valso tre Golden Globe come Miglior Attrice e quattro Primetime Emmy Awards come Miglior Attrice Protagonista.

Nel 1997, Hunt ha vinto l'Oscar come miglior attrice per il ruolo di Carol Connelly nella commedia romantica As Good as It Gets, mentre la sua interpretazione di Cheryl Cohen-Greene in The Sessions (2012) le ha valso una nomination all'Oscar come miglior attrice non protagonista. Altri suoi film di rilievo includono Twister (1996), Cast Away (2000), What Women Want (2000), Pay It Forward (2000), Bobby (2006), Soul Surfer (2011) e The Miracle Season (2018).

Hunt ha debuttato come regista cinematografica con Then She Found Me (2007) e ha diretto il film Ride (2014) e episodi di serie televisive, tra cui House of Lies, This Is Us, Feud: Bette and Joan, American Housewife e l'episodio di apertura del revival di Mad About You.

Хелън Хънт (родена на 15 юни 1963 г.) е американска актриса, режисьор и сценарист, носителка на „Оскар“ за най-добра актриса в „Колкото толкова“ (1997). Световна слава печели със сериала „Луд съм по теб“ (1992–1999), носейки и четири награди „Еми“. Известна е още с филмите „Туистър“, „Корабокрушенецът“ и „Какво искат жените“.
data.name: Хелън Хънт

data.biography:
Bonnie was raised by her mother, and her mother's large Irish Catholic family in Flatbush, Brooklyn. Her mother is one of 9 children! Bonnie started acting and singing at a young age, appearing in all the high school plays at Poly Prep Country Day School in Bay Ridge, Brooklyn. She attended Boston College as a Musical Theater major, and left to move back home to New York to try acting professionally. Bonnie sang in many bands in the NYC music scene, and had a development deal to sing her own music at 17 years old. She was noticed by a modeling scout while waiting tables in NYC, and did some modeling in New York, and Europe, only to return more focused on acting. She packed her bags and moved to Los Angeles at age 22, very quickly had a band and then an agent. One of her first auditions, after getting an agent, was for the lead role in CBS's mini-series, Amours et rock'n' roll (1999), in which she also sang. She now lives in Los Angeles.

- IMDb Mini Biography By: Mel Mckeon
data.name: Bonnie Somerville

data.biography: Bonnie fue criada por su madre, y la gran familia católica irlandesa de su madre en Flatbush, Brooklyn. Su madre es una de 9 hijos! Bonnie comenzó a actuar y cantar a una edad temprana, apareciendo en todas las obras de teatro de la escuela secundaria en Poly Prep Country Day School en Bay Ridge, Brooklyn. Asistió al Boston College como estudiante de Teatro Musical, y se fue a vivir a Nueva York para tratar de actuar profesionalmente. Bonnie cantó en muchas bandas de la escena musical de Nueva York, y tuvo un acuerdo de desarrollo para cantar su propia música a los 17 años.  La descubrió un explorador de modelaje mientras servía mesas en la ciudad de Nueva York, e hizo algo de modelaje en Nueva York, y Europa, sólo para regresar más enfocada en la actuación. Hizo las maletas y se mudó a Los Ángeles a la edad de 22 años, muy pronto tuvo una banda y luego un agente. Una de sus primeras audiciones, después de conseguir un agente, fue para el papel principal en la miniserie de CBS, Amours et rock'n' roll (1999), en la que también cantó. Ahora vive en Los Ángeles.

邦妮由她的母亲和她母亲在布鲁克林弗拉特布什的爱尔兰天主教大家庭抚养长大。她的母亲是 9 个孩子之一！邦妮从小就开始表演和唱歌，出现在布鲁克林湾岭的 Poly Prep Country Day School 的所有高中戏剧中。她就读于波士顿学院，主修音乐剧，然后离开家乡回到纽约尝试专业表演。邦妮在纽约音乐界的许多乐队中演唱，并在 17 岁时签署了演唱自己的音乐的发展协议。她在纽约的侍应生时被一位模特星探注意到，并在纽约和欧洲做过一些模特，但后来回来后更专注于表演。22岁时，她收拾行囊搬到了洛杉矶，很快就有了一支乐队，然后又有了经纪人。在获得经纪人后，她的第一次试镜是在 CBS 的迷你剧《爱与摇滚乐》（1999 年）中担任主角，她还在其中演唱。她现在住在洛杉矶。
data.name: 邦妮·萨默维尔

data.biography: 邦妮由她的母親和她母親在布魯克林弗拉特布什的愛爾蘭天主教大家庭撫養長大。她的母親是 9 個孩子之一！邦妮從小就開始表演和唱歌，出現在布魯克林灣嶺的 Poly Prep Country Day School 的所有高中戲劇中。她就讀於波士頓學院，主修音樂劇，然後離開家鄉回到紐約嘗試專業表演。邦妮在紐約音樂界的許多樂隊中演唱，並在 17 歲時簽署了演唱自己的音樂的發展協議。她在紐約的侍應生時被一位模特星探注意到，並在紐約和歐洲做過一些模特，但後來回來後更專注於表演。22 歲時，她收拾行囊搬到了洛杉磯，很快就有了一支樂隊，然後又有了經紀人。在獲得經紀人後，她的第一次試鏡是在 CBS 的迷你劇《愛與搖滾樂》（1999 年）中擔任主角，她還在其中演唱。她現在住在洛杉磯。
data.name: 邦妮· 薩默維爾

data.biography: Andrew Lau Wai-Keung (Chinese: 劉偉強, born 4 April 1960) is a Hong Kong film director, producer, and cinematographer. Lau began his career in the 1980s and 1990s, serving as a cinematographer to filmmakers such as Ringo Lam, Wong Jing and Wong Kar-wai. In the 1990s, Lau decided to have more creative freedom as a cinematographer by becoming a film director and producer. Apart from making films in his native Hong Kong, Lau has also made films in China, Korea and the United States. A highly prolific filmmaker, Lau has made films in a variety of genres, and is most notable in the West for his action and crime films which include the Young and Dangerous film series, the Infernal Affairs trilogy (the latter co-directed together with Alan Mak), and Revenge of the Green Dragons (executive produced by Martin Scorsese).
data.name: Andrew Lau Wai-Keung

data.biography:
刘伟强，中国香港著名导演。代表作品有《风云》、《无间道》、《伤城》、《头文字D》等。曾斩获香港电影金像奖、台湾电影金马奖和香港电影金紫荆奖最佳导演等奖项。

刘伟强1960年出生于香港，自小爱好摄影，1980年中学毕业后投身邵氏。第一部参与的电影为刘家良的《十八般武艺》，当一名摄影小工。1985年正式担任摄影师，作品有《龙虎风云》和《旺角卡门》等。1990年开始执导筒，拍摄了《朋党》、《人皮灯笼》、《庙街故事》等影片。

1995年与文隽，王晶合组最佳拍档电影制作公司，1996年执导最佳拍档的创业作《古惑仔之人在江湖》，结果此片成绩斐然，接连三部《古惑仔》系列电影全部进入当年香港十大卖座电影行列，掀起香港影坛的江湖片热潮，《古惑仔》系列更是连拍六集，长盛不衰。刘伟强也一举进入一线导演行列，其后一发而不可收，连续拍摄了多部大制作卖座强片。

近些年来已成为振兴香港影坛的中流砥柱，尤其善于拍摄漫画改编电影以及大量运用电脑特技的影片。2002-2003年刘伟强与麦兆辉执导的无间道三部曲则把刘的事业推向的颠峰。曾被王家卫御用摄影师杜可风称赞为“刘是香港手提摇镜最棒的”。刘伟强导演至少引领了三次香港电影的新浪潮，第一次《古惑仔》一系列，之后《中华英雄》、《风云》，再就是《无间道三部曲》。
data.name: 刘伟强

data.biography:
劉偉強，香港著名導演。代表作品有《風雲》、《無間道》、《傷城》、《頭文字 D》等。曾斬獲香港電影金像獎、台灣電影金馬獎和香港電影金紫荊獎最佳導演等獎項。

劉偉強 1960 年出生於香港，自小愛好攝影，1980 年中學畢業後投身邵氏。第一部參與的電影為劉家良的《十八般武藝》，當一名攝影小工。1985 年正式擔任攝影師，作品有《龍虎風雲》和《旺角卡門》等。1990 年開始執導筒，拍攝了《朋黨》、《人皮燈籠》、《廟街故事》等影片。

1995 年與文雋，王晶合組最佳拍檔電影製作公司，1996 年執導最佳拍檔的創業作《古惑仔之人在江湖》，結果此片成績斐然，接聯三部《古惑仔》系列電影全部進入當年香港十大賣座電影行列，掀起香港影壇的江湖片熱潮，《古惑仔》系列更是聯拍六集，長盛不衰。劉偉強也一舉進入一線導演行列，其後一發而不可收，聯續拍攝了多部大製作賣座強片。

近些年來已成為振興香港影壇的中流砥柱，尤其善於拍攝漫畫改編電影以及大量運用電腦特技的影片。2002 - 2003 年劉偉強與麥兆輝執導的無間道三部曲則把劉的事業推向的顛峯。曾被王家衞禦用攝影師杜可風稱讚為“劉是香港手提搖鏡最棒的”。劉偉強導演至少引領了三次香港電影的新浪潮，第一次《古惑仔》一系列，之後《中華英雄》、《風雲》，再就是《無間道三部曲》。
data.name: 劉偉強

data.biography: Andrew Lau, de son vrai nom Lau Wai-keung (劉偉強, né le 4 avril 1960) est un réalisateur, producteur et directeur de la photographie hongkongais, surtout connu pour sa série de films Young and Dangerous et sa trilogie Infernal Affairs. Il travaille souvent en collaboration avec Alan Mak et Felix Chong et est le fondateur de la société de production Basic Pictures.
data.name: Andrew Lau

data.biography: Andrew Lau Wai-Keung ist ein Hongkonger Filmregisseur, Produzent und Kameramann. Lau begann seine Karriere in den 1980er und 1990er Jahren als Kameramann für Filmemacher wie Ringo Lam, Wong Jing und Wong Kar-wai. In den 1990er Jahren beschloss er, sich als Kameramann mehr kreative Freiheit zu verschaffen und wurde Filmregisseur und -produzent. Neben seinen Filmen in seiner Heimat Hongkong hat Lau auch in China, Korea und den USA Filme gedreht. Als äußerst produktiver Filmemacher hat Lau Filme in verschiedenen Genres realisiert und ist im Westen vor allem für seine Action- und Kriminalfilme bekannt, darunter die „Young and Dangerous“-Filmreihe, die „Infernal Affairs“-Trilogie (bei der er zusammen mit Alan Mak Regie führte) und „Revenge of the Green Dragons“ (mit Martin Scorsese als Executive Producer).
data.name: Andrew Lau Wai-Keung

data.biography:
Paul Wu is a DGA/DGC director based out of Vancouver, Canada.

His career in film spanning almost 3 decades started in front of the camera as an actor and stunt performer before moving behind the camera as a fight choreographer, stunt coordinator and now Director.

He has directed 2 episodes of Quest out West: Wild Food for APTN, Charmed for CBS/CW and the "Wild Things" promo video for the BC Lions.

His ability to choreograph and shoot stylized action while emphasizing character and story garnered him a chance to direct for CBS/CW on "Charmed". His many years as Head of the Stunt Department fostered a collaborative approach with both cast and crew as well as instilling a deep appreciation for strong preparation (PREP).

Paul is looking to direct more episodic TV especially in the genres of Action, Drama, Sci-Fi & Fantasy.
data.name: Paul Wu

​From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.

Joelle Marie Carter (born October 10, 1972 height 5' 9" (1,75 m)) is an American actress. Carter was an army brat. Her father Jimmy Carterwas in the U.S. Army and the family moved often throughout the United States. She attended high school in Albany, Dougherty County, Georgia, and enrolled at Augusta State University on a full athletic scholarship for swimming and cross-country.She is a model and has worked with Elite Model Management and Wilhelmina Models.

She has been featured on many movies, most notably the opening scene in American Pie 2. She also has an extensive resume television bit parts, appearing on shows, High Fidelity, Inconceivable and Cold Storage.Since 2010, she has been playing Ava Crowder in the television series Justified on FX.She lives and works in New York with her husband Andy Bates an editor, producer and cinematographer by profession. Both of them together formed a film production company and named it as Blarma.Became a mother for the 1st time at age 37, when her adopted daughter, Luna Rose Bates, was born in July 2010.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Joelle Carter, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.

data.biography: Joelle Marie Carter mieszkała w wielu miastach Stanów Zjednoczonych. Jej ojciec był żołnierzem w związku z czym jej rodzina często się przeprowadzała. Aktorka ukończyła szkołę średnią w mieście Albany, w stanie Georgia. Następnie uczyła się w Augusta College, gdyż dostała stypendium sportowe, dzięki dobrym wynikom w pływaniu. Swoją przyszłość związała jednak z modelingiem. To właśnie dla kariery modelki Joelle przeprowadziła się do Nowego Jorku, gdzie współpracowała ze słynnymi agencjami, takimi jak Elite i Wilhelmina. Obecnie (2007) mieszka i pracuje w Nowym Jorku.

Anna Quirentia Nilsson was a Swedish-born actress who achieved success in American silent movies. Starring in some 200 feature films. The first Swedish actress to receive a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame. In 1905, she had earned enough for a ticket across the Atlantic. In New York she was discovered on a thriving avenue by the famous portrait painter James Carroll Beckwith and soon she was New York's highest paid model. In 1907 she was named America's most beautiful woman and became a model for the 1910s beauty ideal, The Gibson Girl Look.
data.name: Anna Q. Nilsson

data.biography:
Michel Muller est un humoriste, comédien, scénariste et réalisateur français né le 9 septembre 1966 à Vienne (Autriche).

Après avoir donné des cours de mathématiques pendant deux ans, Michel Muller se tourne définitivement vers le spectacle. Ses premiers spectacles solo Surtout pas d'fleurs, Il vous aime et Pas tout noir, pas tout blanc, coécrits avec Christophe Bergeronneau et Sophie Pincemaille, mis en scène par Sophie Pincemaille, le font remarquer par son humour noir dépourvu de toute auto-censure. Avant d'être recruté par Canal +, Michel Muller a bien failli officier pour Michel Drucker. Mais les dirigeants de la chaîne l'ont censuré et le comique s'est envolé... En 1997, il obtient un rôle dans le film La voie est libre de Stéphane Clavier. Repéré par Canal+, il intervient en tant que chroniqueur dans l'émission Nulle part ailleurs, alors présentée par Nagui, pour une rubrique de 2 à 3 minutes intitulée Fallait pas l'inviter et dressant un portrait outrageusement subversif de l'invité du jour. Il apparaît ensuite dans le film Wasabi aux côtés de Jean Reno, son premier grand rôle au cinéma. On pourra également le découvrir dans des comédies comme Taxi 2 ou bien Astérix et Obélix contre César. En comédien éclectique il prête sa voix pour le pré-pilote de la bande dessinée Maurice et Patapon.

data.biography:
Jack Palance (born Volodymyr Palahniuk; February 18, 1919 – November 10, 2006) was an American actor. Known for playing tough guys and villains, he was nominated for three Academy Awards, all for Best Actor in a Supporting Role, receiving nominations for his roles in Sudden Fear (1952) and Shane (1953) and winning almost 40 years later for his role in City Slickers (1991).

Born in Lattimer Mines, Pennsylvania, the son of Ukrainian immigrants, Palance served in the United States Army Air Forces during World War II. He went on to briefly attend Stanford University before pursuing a career in the theatre. He made his film acting debut in Panic in the Streets (1950). Following his roles in Sudden Fear and Shane, Palance starred as Count Dracula in the 1974 television film Bram Stoker's Dracula, and played crime lord Yves Perret in Tango & Cash (1989). He also served as the host of the ABC television series Ripley's Believe It or Not! (1982–1986). In 2006, Palance died of natural causes at the home of his daughter Holly in Montecito, California.
data.name: Jack Palance

data.biography:
Jack Palance (bürgerlich Wolodymyr Iwanowitsch Palagnjuk; * 18. Februar 1919 in Lattimer Mines, Pennsylvania; † 10. November 2006 in Montecito, Kalifornien) war ein US-amerikanischer Filmschauspieler ukrainischer Abstammung.

Nach Kriegsende begann er seine Karriere als Schauspieler.

Auch im europäischen Film hatte Palance wiederholt Engagements. So spielte er 1963 in Jean-Luc Godards Die Verachtung (Le mépris) einen US-amerikanischen Filmproduzenten namens Jeremy Prokosch, der einen Sandalenfilm unter der Regie von Fritz Lang finanzieren will und dabei weniger auf Kunst als auf Spektakel setzt. Prokoschs Verhalten stößt auf heftige Kritik des von Michel Piccoli dargestellten Drehbuchautors, womit der Unterschied zwischen US-amerikanischer und europäischer Kinokultur aufgezeigt wird.

In Deutschland einer großen Anzahl von Zuschauern bekannt wurde Palance 1963 durch seine Hauptrolle in der noch in Schwarzweiß ausgestrahlten Fernsehserie „Zirkusdirektor Johnny Slate“. Darin trat er nicht als Bösewicht in Erscheinung, er löste kleine und große Probleme rund um das Geschehen vielmehr als sympathischer, aber kompromisslos hart zupackender Direktor.

Auch in Italowestern war Palance zu sehen. Unter der Regie von Sergio Corbucci spielte er 1968 in Die gefürchteten Zwei (Il mercenario) eine Hauptrolle; seine Partner waren Franco Nero und Tony Musante. 1970 war Palance in Zwei Companeros (Vamos a matar, compañeros) an der Seite von Franco Nero und Tomás Milián in einer hervorstechenden Nebenrolle zu sehen.

1969 verkörperte er Fidel Castro in Richard Fleischers Che-Guevara-Filmbiografie Che!. In der auch im deutschen Fernsehen ausgestrahlten Serie Bronk spielte er 1975/76 den Kriminalbeamten Lieutenant Alex „Bronk“ Bronkov.  In der deutsch-amerikanischen Koproduktion Out of Rosenheim (1987) war er als Liebhaber von Marianne Sägebrecht zu sehen. 1989 spielte er in dem Film Batman den Gangsterboss Grissom, der vom „Joker“ (Jack Nicholson) erschossen wurde.

1991 gewann Palance einen Oscar als bester Nebendarsteller für seine Darstellung in dem Film City Slickers – Die Großstadt-Helden.

Jack Palance, nome artístico de Vladimir Palahniuk, (Hazleton, 18 de fevereiro de 1919 – Montecito, 10 de novembro de 2006) foi um ator norte-americano. Antes da carreira artística, ele foi lutador de boxe profissional, com muitos acreditando que sua face desfigurada se devesse aos golpes recebidos, mas na verdade a desfiguração foi causada por um acidente de avião, quando ele tomava aulas de pilotagem. Apesar de ter sido indicado ao Óscar anteriormente, "Os Brutos Também Amam", (1953) só obtém sua primeira estatueta em 1992, pelo filme "Amigos, Sempre Amigos".

Jack Palance, nascut Volodímir (o Walter) Palahniuk (Lattimer Mines, 18 de febrer de 1919 − Montecito, 10 de novembre de 2006) va ser un actor estatunidenc d'origen ucraïnès. La seva cara amb trets angulosos i demacrats, refeta de resultes de ferides rebudes en la Segona Guerra Mundial, i tot el seu aspecte l'aïllen a papers de dolent en westerns o pel·lícules de gàngsters. La seva carrera és llançada per l'èxit inesperat de la pel·lícula "Bagdad Cafè" el 1987 en el qual es descobreix una altra faceta del seu talent. Un Oscar corona la seva carrera el 1990.

杰克·帕兰斯（出生于弗拉基米尔·帕拉纽克;1919 年 2 月 18 日 - 2006 年 11 月 10 日）是美国演员。他以扮演硬汉和恶棍而闻名，曾获得三项奥斯卡金像奖提名，均获得最佳男配角奖，因在《突如其来的恐惧》（1952 年）和《肖恩》（1953 年）中的角色而获得提名，并在近 40 年后因在《城市滑头》（1991 年）中的角色而获奖。

data.biography:
Volodymyr Palahniuk, sahne adıyla Jack Palance, 18 Şubat 1919 tarihinde Lattimer Mines, Pennsylvania'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Ukraynalı göçmen bir ailenin oğlu olan Palance, babası gibi bir süre kömür madenlerinde çalıştıktan sonra profesyonel boksörlüğe yöneldi ve "Jack Brazzo" takma adıyla ringlere çıktı. II. Dünya Savaşı sırasında Amerika Birleşik Devletleri Ordusu Hava Kuvvetleri'nde B-24 Liberator pilotu olarak görev yaptı. Savaştan sonra Stanford Üniversitesi'nde drama eğitimi aldı ve oyunculuk kariyerine Broadway'de, "Arzu Tramvayı" (A Streetcar Named Desire) oyununda Marlon Brando'nun yedeği olarak başladı.

Sinemadaki ilk çıkışını Elia Kazan'ın "Panic in the Streets" (1950) filmiyle yapan Palance, keskin yüz hatları, kısık sesi ve tehditkar duruşuyla kısa sürede Hollywood'un aranan "kötü adam" karakterlerinden biri haline geldi. Joan Crawford ile başrolü paylaştığı "Korku" (Sudden Fear) (1952) ve özellikle Western klasiği "Vadiler Aslanı" (Shane) (1953) filmindeki soğukkanlı silahşor Jack Wilson rolüyle iki yıl üst üste En İyi Yardımcı Erkek Oyuncu dalında Oscar'a aday gösterildi. Shane filmindeki performansı, sinema tarihinin en ürkütücü kötü adam portrelerinden biri olarak kabul edilir.

Kariyeri boyunca Jean-Luc Godard'ın "Nefret" (Contempt) (1963) gibi Avrupa sanat filmlerinden Spagetti Westernlere kadar çok çeşitli yapımlarda yer aldı. Palance, Tim Burton'ın "Batman" (1989) filminde Gotham'ın suç baronu ve Joker'in (Jack Napier) eski patronu Carl Grissom'ı canlandırarak yeni nesil izleyicilerin de hafızasına kazındı. Ancak kariyerinin en unutulmaz anlarından biri 70'li yaşlarında geldi. Billy Crystal ile başrolü paylaştığı komedi filmi "Şehir Züppeleri" (City Slickers) (1991) filmindeki sert kovboy Curly Washburn rolü, ona nihayet En İyi Yardımcı Erkek Oyuncu Oscar'ını kazandırdı. Ödül töreninde sahnede tek eliyle şınav çekerek yaptığı teşekkür konuşması, Oscar tarihinin en ikonik anlarından biri olarak kayıtlara geçti.

Aktör, 10 Kasım 2006 tarihinde Montecito, California'daki evinde, ailesinin yanındayken yaşlılığa bağlı doğal sebeplerden dolayı 87 yaşında hayatını kaybetmiştir.

Kate Marie Nash (born 6 July 1987) is an English singer, songwriter, musician and actress. Nash rose to prominence in the UK with the sleeper hit "Foundations" (2007). Her debut album, Made of Bricks, peaked at number 1 in the UK and number 36 in the US. Nash won the award for Best British Female Artist at the 2008 Brit Awards.

Her second studio album, My Best Friend Is You, was released in 2010 and reached the top 10 in both the UK and Germany. The album's lead single, "Do-Wah-Doo", peaked at number 15 in the UK, becoming her fourth UK Top 40 single.

After being dropped by her record label, Nash self-released her third studio album, Girl Talk, on 4 March 2013. The album failed to match the commercial success of Nash's previous albums, though it charted inside the top 100 in the UK, Ireland, Germany and Austria.

In April 2017, Nash launched a Kickstarter to finance a fourth studio album. On 21 April 2017, Nash released a four-track EP, Agenda.

data.biography:
Kirill Valerievich Käro (Russian: Кири́лл Вале́рьевич Кя́ро; born 24 February 1975) is an Estonian-Russian actor. He is best known for playing the lead character in 32 episodes of The Sniffer (2013–2017), as George Safronov in 16 episodes of the Netflix sci-fi series Better than Us (2019), and as Sergey in the thriller series To the Lake (2020).

Kirill Käro was born in Tallinn, Estonia. His father was a sea captain of mixed Estonian-Russian descent, and his Russian mother was a teacher. His first cousin, once removed, is actor Volli Käro. After graduating from secondary school at Lasnamäe in 1992, Käro entered a five-year acting course at the Boris Shchukin Theatre Institute in Moscow. Following graduation in 1997, he continued to work at the Boris Shchukin Theatre Institute under the mentorship of Armen Dzhigarkhanyan.

Käro returned to Tallinn in 1999, acting at the Russian Theatre for five years, before going back to Moscow to the Praktika Theatre in 2004.

Käro's career in film and television began in 2008 with various small parts. In 2013, he landed the leading role in The Sniffer, for which he won the Association of Film and TV Producers award in the category Best Actor.

In 2019, he played the main role of George Safronov in sixteen episodes of the Netflix Russian android thriller series Better than Us.

In 2020, Käro starred as Sergey in the lead role of the Russian television series To the Lake. The show was acquired by Netflix and broadcast in October 2020.
data.name: Kirill Käro

data.biography: Учился в актёрской студии при Русском театре Эстонии. В 1997 году окончил Высшее театральное училище имени Б. В. Щукина (курс М. Пантелеевой). По окончании училища поступил в труппу Театра под руководством Армена Джигарханяна в Москве. С 1999 по 2004 год был актёром Русского театра Эстонии. В 2005 году вернулся в Москву. Играл в театре «Практика» (2005-2007). Снимается в кино и телесериалах. Сотрудничает с «Театром. doc», театром «Человек».
data.name: Кирилл Кяро

Марина Олександрівна Кошкіна — українська акторка театру та кіно. Заслужена артистка України (2021), лауреатка Національної кінопремії «Золота Дзиґа» 2021 року в номінації «Найкраща акторка» («Забуті»).

data.biography: Joshua Taylor Bassett (born December 22, 2000) is an American actor and singer. He began his career as a teen actor, appearing on the third season of Disney Channel family sitcom Stuck in the Middle (2018) as Aidan Peters. Bassett rose to prominence for his leading role as high school student Ricky Bowen in the Disney+ streaming series High School Musical: The Musical: The Series (2019–2023), and for its accompanying soundtracks, for which he was nominated for two Children's and Family Emmy Awards, winning in 2023. He also starred in Better Nate Than Ever and led the voice cast in Night at the Museum: Kahmunrah Rises Again (both 2022). In music, Bassett was signed to Warner Records in 2020 and subsequently released four extended plays. His debut album The Golden Years was released on July 26, 2024. He is currently starring as Seymour Krelborn in Little Shop of Horrors on Broadway.
data.name: Joshua Bassett
